hero.headline: Every cane has a story.
hero.subheading: Each cane is handcrafted from locally sourced hardwood, showcasing the natural beauty and unique character of every piece.

features.title: Locally Sourced Hardwood
features.description: Wood from local farms and land in Middle Georgia.

features.title: Handcrafted
features.description: Every curve follows the grain. Shaped, sanded, and finished by hand in a family workshop.

features.title: One of a Kind
features.description: No two canes are alike. Each piece carries the unique voice of its timber.

featuredSection.title: Featured Collection
featuredSection.subtitle: Here are some featured pieces from our collection.

aboutPreview.title: About CallisCanes
aboutPreview.body: A family owned business in Middle GA.

galleryPreview.title: From the Gallery
galleryPreview.subtitle: Workshop moments, finished builds, and close-up craftsmanship.

items.quote: I just received this cane today from John Callis. It is a great cane, absolutely love it. Was lovingly packaged and shipped. He even called to see if I received it and if I liked it. Definitely love it, and hope to purchase again.
items.author: Richard
items.imageAlt: Handcrafted spiral walking cane with bark and polished wood

items.quote: Just want to say hi to all the followers — and especially to John Callis. I'm a 20-year Army veteran and I was looking for a personalized cane. John built this beautiful baby for me. He made a post with this cane. Well, now it's in my hands! Great page full of friends. Thank you all!!
items.author: Fernando Marcano
items.imageAlt: Army Aviation Association emblem set into a handcrafted cane

ctaBanner.title: Ready for your own handcrafted cane?
ctaBanner.body: Tell us about the wood you love, the trails you walk, and the story you want to carry.
